name: PEDEVCO CORP
business: We are an oil and gas company focused on the acquisition and development of oil and natural gas assets where the latest in modern drilling and completion techniques and technologies have yet to be applied. Our current properties are located in the Denver-Julesberg Basin in Colorado and Wyoming, the Powder River Basin in Wyoming, and in the San Andres formation of the Permian Basin situated in West Texas and eastern New Mexico.
sellsTo: Oil and gas purchasers, with two customers comprising 26% and 22% of 2025 revenues.
One non-operated operator accounted for approximately 30% of total production sales in 2025.

exposures.sentence: We are an oil and gas company focused on the acquisition and development of oil and natural gas assets where the latest in modern drilling and completion techniques and technologies have yet to be applied.

catalysts.sentence: The borrowing base is scheduled to be redetermined semiannually on or about April 1 and October 1 of each calendar year, commencing on April 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Operator election deadline for Amber DSU working interest
catalysts.sentence: The Operator has until May 10, 2026, to make an election to acquire up to 50% of the Company’s working interest in the Amber DSU at an acquisition price of approximately $2.5 million, with no election having been made to date.
